candidates.why: Direct COGS label, but it appears twice in the preview, creating ambiguity. A unique total cost-of-sales label is preferable.

candidates.why: Non-recurring component only; should be excluded from core COGS if a broader COGS line exists.
Unique direct cost-of-sales line matching the full COGS concept; preferable over duplicated Cost of Goods Sold labels.
Inventory asset, not income-statement COGS.
Inventory component, not reported COGS expense.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|misclassified. Selected the unique direct cost-of-sales row to avoid ambiguity from duplicated 'Cost of Goods Sold' labels.

Balance sheet intangible line, not period R&D expense.
